titles.text: Momotaro Dentetsu Jr.: Zenkoku Ramen Meguri no Maki
桃太郎電鉄 jr. 全国ラーメンめぐりの巻

descriptions.text: Momotaro Dentetsu jr.: Zenkoku Ramen Meguri no Maki (lit. "Momotaro Electric Railway jr: Rolls around Ramen in Japan") is a video game in the Momotaro Dentetsu series of board game-style video games genre released in 1998, developed by Make and published by Hudson Soft for Game Boy. The game was only released in Japan.
